agreement_clauses: The Licensee hereby agree with Licensor to occupy the said premises situated At. Room No. 6, Pam, Aanadiali, Post. Navapur, Boisar, Tal. Palghar, Dist. Thane, for the period of 11 Months which is commencing from dated 01/05/2008 to 31/03/2009.
On the period of expiration the Licensee shall vacate peacefully the premises and handover the key of Room/Flat to the Licensor with all mentioned fixtures fittings in proper working conditions.

The Licensee shall pay License Fee Rs. 1,000/- (Rupees One Thousand only) to Licensor payment as rent per months. Licensee paid to Licensor the amount of Rs. 1,000/- (Rupees One Thousand only) paid as security deposit.

Society maintenance charges, Water, Panchayat, and such all taxes are payable by the Licensor, Licensor will also attend the same maintenance job done by Licensee, the expenses will be recovered from the Licensor.

Electricity bill will be paid by Licensee. In case of faulty electric meter the Licensor shall approach to M.S.E.D. for rectifying the same. In case of faulty working excess billing etc. the Licensee shall approach the Licensor for repairs. The Licensee will not be responsible for the payment of previous outstanding bills.
During the terms of this agreement any damage, incurred/occurred by house breaking etc., the Licensee shall be responsible for the loss or repairs of the Room/Flat whatsoever.

The day to day repairs such as fuse, replacement of Bulbs, Tubes lights, leakages of water pipes, etc. inside the premises, are to be done by the Licensee at its own cost and keep it in good and tenantable conditions.
The Licensee shall not assign any rights to any third party in respect of the premises or any part of the premises should be sublet.
The agreement is made and signed by the both parties at Boisar.
The Licensee or Licensor can terminate this Leave and License after giving one month notice from either side.

Licensee shall at the time of going to the native place shall lock the room in well good condition and while on the outdoor or outstation the Licensor shall not be responsible for the material gone for lost, misplace, robbery, decocted or may of the incident if so occurred.
In case of termination the paid amount in advance shall be refunded after proper adjustment.
